wheelBuilderReadyHelp: Tier sources and costs are in sync
wheelConfirmDeleteBody: This will permanently delete this game configuration. This cannot be undone.
wheelConfirmEndBody: End this game session? If any prize could not be deducted from inventory, you'll review it before the session is cleared.
wheelConfirmRebuildBody: This will rebuild the game with your config changes. Matching live session progress will be preserved where possible.
wheelConfirmResetConfigBody: This will clear the preview test session for this game.
wheelConfirmResetLiveBody: This will clear all play counts, revenue tracking, and skipped deductions for this live session. This cannot be undone.
wheelCreateGridBody: Reveal hidden cells from the same weighted prize list.
wheelCreateWheelBody: Spin a visual wheel with weighted prize odds.
wheelGoLiveBody: This switches the game into live mode so plays can record session progress and sales.
wheelGoLivePendingWarning: You still have pending edits. Live mode will use the current rebuilt game until you rebuild again.
wheelPendingChangesBody: Config edits save automatically. Rebuild applies them to the game.
wheelPendingChangesWarning: Every tier needs a source lot before you can rebuild.
wheelStageCaptionConfig: Preview the game without recording sales
wheelStageCaptionGridConfig: Preview grid reveals without recording sales
wheelStageCaptionGridLive: Pick a grid cell and reveal a verified result
wheelStageCaptionLive: Run the live game and record sales
wheelSourceSelectedItemMissing: Selected item is no longer in this lot
wheelTierBasicsSectionSubtitle: Set the public label, prize count, and cost for this tier.
wheelTierCelebrationSectionSubtitle: Control chase behavior and the visual flair when this tier wins.
wheelTierCelebrationEmojiHint: Emoji burst when this tier wins, like 🎉 🔥 or 💎
wheelTierChaseHelp: Mark this tier as a special chase hit when it lands.
wheelTierCountSinglesHint: Singles tiers always deduct 1 item per hit
wheelTierEditorSubtitle: Adjust quantity, source, and prize behavior without bloating the tier list.
wheelTierSourceSectionSubtitle: Bind the tier to a lot and, for singles, choose the exact prize item.
wheelOddsSubtitle: Set the chance for each tier. Editing one tier rebalances the others so the total stays at 100%.
wheelInspectorAssignSourceDetail: Assign a source lot in the tier editor.
wheelInspectorConfigSubtitle: Build tiers, sources, and target margin.
wheelInspectorGridConfigSubtitle: Build grid outcomes, sources, and target margin.
wheelInspectorEmptyState: Create a game configuration to get started.
wheelInspectorSessionSubtitle: Track plays, revenue, cost, and stock.
wheelInvalidChaseNeedsSinglesItem: Chase tiers must be tied to a specific singles item.
wheelInvalidSinglesOutOfStock: Selected singles item is out of stock.
wheelRepairBeforeLive: Repair the game before going live: {{label}}: {{reason}}
wheelFairnessCommittedSummary: Hash committed before the result lands
wheelFairnessServerVerificationSummary: Server proof ready for public verification
wheelFairnessLocalVerificationSummary: Local fallback proof used for this result
wheelFairnessSeedVerifiedNote: SHA-256 of the seed above matches the committed hash.
wheelFairnessUnavailableError: Game fairness verification is unavailable right now. Please try again.
wheelFairnessEmptyState: Play the game to start a fairness history for this session.
wheelSpectatorDialogBody: Show this QR code on stream so viewers can follow the game from their own phone.
wheelSpectatorDialogEndedBody: This spectator link is now a recap. Starting again creates a brand new spectator link and QR code, so viewers need the new one for live updates.
wheelSpectatorQrAlt: QR code for the public game spectator page
